subcodes.first_line: O Rahim! By God, I have remained solitary and alone, and lo, I find Myself in the serpent's mouth, and this doth bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رحیم تالله قد بقیت وحیدا ثم فریدا و اذا اکون فی فم الثعبان و یشهد بذلک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
